title: Kark@miysh #3751
definition:
Carchemish = "fortress of Chemosh"

 1) a Hittite capital northeast of Israel on the Euphrates river
    captured by Pharaoh Necho and then from him by Nebuchadnezzar
nasbUsage:

 1) a Hittite capital northeast of Israel on the Euphrates river
    captured by Pharaoh Necho and then from him by Nebuchadnezzar
